items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG Denim fabric is a classic material widely used in the brand's handbag and apparel series. In the Gucci Insignia fashion collection, this high-recognizability classic jacquard fabric returns, using a full-body layout design to inject rich details into many classic luggage pieces. Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Black and ivory white GG jacquard denim fabric, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG Detail Zip Wallet. Gucci small leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG hardware to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, embossed fabric lining with GG details, inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG MARMONT MATLASS mini bucket bag style. Inspired by the natural earth tones, Gucci's enduring design continues to present new iterations season after season. For the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, sage green enriches the latest leather selections, a timeless color that stands the test of time. Here, it enriches a signature GG Marmont mini bucket bag with gold double-G hardware. Sage green Matlass chevron leather, gold hardware, cloud print and microfiber lining, suede-like surface, detachable double-G charm, 2 card slots, chain strap, drop 23.6 inches, drawstring closure, also wearable as a crossbody bag.
items.name_cn:

Size: 19x 17x 10cm.

Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Attache Small Shoulder Bag. The charm of GG Crystal Canvas interprets the 2023 Fall/Winter Men's Accessories collection, with a glossy surface and durable properties injecting contemporary style into the brand's classic design. This small shoulder bag features a recognizable crescent shape, and the G-hook buckle adds design aesthetics. Classic hardware combined with soft materials interprets vintage charm in a beautiful and romantic way. Black GG Crystal Canvas, palladium-tone hardware, red and blue striped webbing, also comes with a leather shoulder strap, detachable webbing shoulder strap (45cm high) G-hook with zipper.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Blondie Mini Bucket Bag. The Gucci Blondie series features a bold pattern paired with leather in matching tones, exuding a subtle and restrained atmosphere throughout. The series ingeniously incorporates circular geometric interlocking double G, showcasing Gucci's modern aesthetic design. Brand logo details add a unique charm to this black leather mini bucket bag adorned with tassel details. Black leather, taffeta lining, circular interlocking double G leather patch, leather tassel, top handle (8cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (55cm high), drawstring closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted from light green leather, featuring elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, exuding a modern temperament. Light green leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail on front, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high) Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Intro: The new Beloved fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s archival designs. The classic brown and ebony design, reinterpreted, conveys the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. Material features boutique-quality PVC with high-density webbing and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Original Leather【New】GG Marmont Small Quilted Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain-link mini shoulder bag features a structured yet soft silhouette and a large flap closure with double-G metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options, allowing you to switch between shoulder and handbag styles. Features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, vintage gold metal hardware double-G, open interior pocket, adjustable chain shoulder strap (60 cm high). Also functions as a crossbody bag. Zip closure with extended pull, weight: approx. 0.394 kg.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖Original Leather【New】GG Marmont Small Quilted Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain-link mini shoulder bag features a structured yet soft silhouette and a large flap closure with double-G metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options, allowing you to switch between shoulder and handbag styles. Features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, vintage gold metal hardware double-G, open interior pocket, adjustable chain shoulder strap (60 cm high). Also functions as a crossbody bag. Zip closure with extended pull, weight: approx. 0.394 kg.
Model: 447632.
Size: 13(L) x 24(W) x 7cm(D)
Color: Burgundy/Original Leather.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green packaging💖
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green packaging💖
G Family New Arrival Introduction: Immersed in a retro vibe, the Ophidia family welcomes a new member—a medium tote. The square shape evokes retro designs. The GG high-grade faux canvas is embellished with red and green webbing, among the brand's most distinctive classic elements, paying tribute to the brand's equestrian origins. Ophidia Web
Model: 602676.
Dimensions: 19*14*6cm.
Color: Brown/PVC.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green packaging💖Jackie 1961 series waist pack!!️ In the Gucci Beloved collection, the Jackie 1961 series is constantly renewed, launching multiple travel accessories. This waist pack is made of classic GG Supreme canvas, adorned with the brand's iconic red and green webbing. GUCCI BELOVED selects a new fashion item every season, reinterpreting the brand's classic designs. Hidden details: Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green webbing, microfiber lining. Inside: 1 leather open pocket. Snap closure and push-in lock.

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is crafted from exquisite and lightweight GG Monogram PVC, paired with an elegant chain strap, adding a bright touch to the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. items.name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The Gucci Go series is designed for sport. This shoulder bag is crafted from exquisite and lightweight GG Monogram PVC, paired with an elegant chain strap, adding a bright touch to the 2025 Spring/Summer collection. The interior layout is also very practical, with a removable mirror on the back.
Brown GG Monogram PVC
White leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Beige cotton-linen blend lining
Interior: three main compartments, one zip pocket
Exterior: removable mirror on the back

Spring buckle
Model: 826761.
Dimensions: 21.5cm (W) x 14cm (H) x 9cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.8kg

Made in Italy
